name: concerttracker
description: Concert tracker with server-side API proxying for Ticketmaster, Bandsintown, Spotify, and Deezer.

scripts.check: node --check server/index.js && node --check api/index.js && node -e "new Function(require('fs').readFileSync('client/assets/app.js', 'utf8')); console.log('syntax ok')"
